title: delivery.rs: manual RFC3339 format string used 3x
description:
LOCATION: src/delivery.rs lines 149, 375, 458

FINDING: Three sites use chrono::Utc::now().format("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ").to_string() to produce ISO 8601 timestamps. chrono provides Utc::now().to_rfc3339() for this purpose, which is shorter, less error-prone, and avoids a manual format string.

IMPACT: If the format string is ever mistyped (e.g. %S instead of %M), SQLite date comparisons will silently produce wrong ordering. Using to_rfc3339() is the idiomatic form and self-documents intent.
close_reason: Fixed: RFC3339 format via chrono to_rfc3339_opts
